title.ko: 전기 또는 자기 변수 조절 시스템
title.en: SYSTEMS FOR REGULATING ELECTRIC OR MAGNETIC VARIABLES

definition.ko: (1) 이 서브클래스는 다음의 것을 포함한다. - 계에 한정 - 조정량을 복원하는 장치의 전기적 특성을 변화시키기 위한 수압식, 공기식, 기계적, 전기적 모터의 사용 - 본질적인 특징이 정지형 변환기와 전류 또는 전압조정기와의 조합에 있는 경우 (2) 이 서브클래스는 요소 그 자체를 포함하지 않고, 단지 이것은 관련하는 서브클래스에 포함된다

title.ko: 전기량의 단일 또는 복수의 소망 값으로부터의 편차를 시스템의 출력부에서 검출하고 시스템내의 장치에 피드백하고, 이것에 의하여 검출량을 단일 또는 복수의 소망치로 복원하는 자동제어시스템, 즉 반작용시스템
title.en: Automatic systems in which deviations of an electric quantity from one or more predetermined values are detected at the output of the system and fed back to a device within the system to restore the detected quantity to its predetermined value or values, i.e. retroactive systems
Regulating electric characteristics of arcs
by means of saturable magnetic devices
by means of discharge tubes
by means of semiconductor devices

title.ko: 전압 또는 전류 조절 (G05F1/02가 우선)
title.en: Regulating voltage or current (G05F0001020000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 최종제어장치에 의해 실제로 조정된 변량이 교류인 것 (G05F1/625가 우선)
title.en: wherein the variable is actually regulated by the final control device is AC (G05F0001625000 takes precedence)
using ferroresonant transformers as final control devices
using tap transformers or tap changing inductors as final control devices
with motor driven tap switch
controlled by discharge tubes or semiconductor devices
combined with discharge tubes or semiconductor devices
semiconductor devices only
combined with separate magnetic control devices having a controllable degree of saturation

title.ko: 최종제어장치로서 강압 또는 승압 변압기를 사용하는 것
title.en: using bucking or boosting transformers as final control devices
with motor in control circuit

title.ko: 전원과 부하사이에 직렬의 복수 권선을 포함하는 변압기(G05F 1/247이 우선)
title.en: the transformers including plural windings in series between source and load (G05F0001247000 takes precedence)
combined with discharge tubes or semiconductor devices
semiconductor devices only
using magnetic devices having a controllable degree of saturation as final control devices
with specific core structure, e.g. gap, aperture, slot, permanent magnet
with plural windings through which current to be controlled is conducted
on different cores
combined with discharge tubes or semiconductor devices
semiconductor devices only
using discharge tubes or semiconductor devices as final control devices
discharge tubes only
semiconductor devices only
being transistors in series with the load
being controlled rectifiers in series with the load
with phase control

title.ko: 최종 제어장치에 의해 실제로 조정되는 변량이 직류인 것 (G05F1/625가 우선)
title.en: wherein the variable actually regulated by the final control device is DC (G05F0001625000 takes precedence)
using discharge tubes in series with the load as final control devices
additionally controlled by the unregulated supply

title.ko: 최종제어장치로서 부하와 직렬로 반도체장치를 사용하는 것
title.en: using semiconductor devices in series with the load as final control devices
including two stages of regulation, at least one of which is output level responsive, e.g. coarse and fine regulation

title.ko: 출력, 예. 전류, 전압, 역률의 편차에 응답하는 수단에 부가하여 제어장치 또는 부하의 상태를 검지하는 것 (G05F1/563이 우선)
title.en: sensing a condition of the system or its load in addition to means responsive to deviations in the output of the system, e.g. current, voltage, power factor (G05F0001563000 takes precedence)
for temperature compensation
for protection
with overvoltage detector
with overcurrent detector
characterised by the feedback circuit
for plural loads
providing voltages of opposite polarities
including plural semiconductor devices as final control devices for a single load
semiconductor devices connected in series
using discharge tubes in parallel with the load as final control devices
including two stages of regulation, at least one of which is output level responsive
using semiconductor devices in parallel with the load as final control devices
including two stages of regulation, at least one of which is output level responsive
using semiconductor devices in series and in parallel with the load as final control devices
using bucking or boosting DC sources
wherein it is irrelevant whether the variable actually regulated is AC or DC
using variable impedances in series with the load as final control devices
being Hall effect devices, magnetoresistors or thermistors
being pressure-sensitive resistors
being plural resistors among which a selection is made
using variable impedances in parallel with the load as final control devices
using variable impedances in series and in parallel with the load as final control devices
Regulating electric power
to the maximum power available from a generator, e.g. from solar cell
Regulating power factor; Regulating reactive current or power

title.ko: 자기조정특성을 갖는 하나의 비제어소자 또는 복수의 소자로 된 조합으로 자기조정특성을 갖는 것에 의하여 전기량을 조정하는 비반작용계
title.en: Non-retroactive systems for regulating electric variables by using an uncontrolled element, or an uncontrolled combination of elements, such element or such combination having self-regulating properties

title.ko: 전류 또는 전압의 조정
title.en: Regulating voltage or current

title.ko: 변수가 교류인 것
title.en: wherein the variable is AC

title.ko: 포화 및 비포화의 인덕터 장치를 조합하여 사용하는 것, 예. 공진회로와 조합되어 있는 것
title.en: using combinations of saturated and unsaturated inductive devices, e g. combined with resonant circuit

title.ko: 변수가 직류인 것
title.en: wherein the variable is DC

title.ko: 비선형 특성을 지닌 비제어소자를 사용하는 것
title.en: using uncontrolled devices with non-linear characteristics
being glow discharge tubes

title.ko: 반도체장치인 것
title.en: being semiconductor devices
using Zener diodes

title.ko: 다이오드 트랜지스터 조합을 사용하는 것(G05F 3/18이 우선)
title.en: using diode-transistor combinations (G05F0003180000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 트랜지스터는 쌍방향성형(biporar) 뿐인 것(G05F 3/26, G05F 3/30이 우선)
title.en: wherein the transistors are of the bipolar type only (G05F0003260000, G05F0003300000 take precedence)

title.ko: 트랜지스터는 전계효과형뿐인 것(G05F 3/26, G05F 3/30이 우선)
title.en: wherein the transistors are of the field-effect type only (G05F0003260000, G05F0003300000 take precedence)
Current mirrors
combined with a non-linear current amplifier

title.ko: 다른 전류밀도로 작동하는 2개의 쌍극성 트랜지스터의 베이스-에미터 전압간의 차를 이용하는 조정기(G05F 3/26이 우선)
title.en: Regulators using the difference between the base-emitter voltages of two bipolar transistors operating at different current densities (G05F0003260000 takes precedence)
Systems for regulating electric variables by detecting deviations in the electric input to the system and thereby controlling a device within the system to obtain a regulated output
Phase controlled switching using electronic tubes or three or more terminal semiconductive devices
using a transformer or inductor as the final control device
saturable
using a linearly acting final control device
Regulating magnetic variables
